provenance.author: Gemini Code Assist
provenance.context: A semantic capsule summarizing the project's development and utility scripts.

intent.primary_goal: Describe the `scripts/` directory and its contents, so that developers can understand the available tooling for automating development workflows.

identity.role: An overview of the project's utility scripts for development automation.

folder_scope.purpose: Contains Node.js scripts for automating development tasks like creating changelog entries.

script_catalog.add-changelog.js: An interactive CLI script (`npm run changelog`) that prompts for 'Good/Bad/Ugly' sections and prepends a formatted entry to the root CHANGELOG.md. It also records the change in the ChronoSCRIBE audit ledger.

trust.note: High-confidence summary of the scripts directory. This capsule should be updated if new scripts are added.
